detail.description:
Welcome to Animal Match Link - Onet  Tile Match Puzzle with your free time to relax,рҹҸҶa super fun Onet puzzle matching game with cool challenges and brain teasers, рҹҳҠenjoy a fun and relaxing puzzle game.

HOW TO PLAY?
вӯҗConnect two same tiles to eliminate them with a polyline on a Mahjong-styled board
вӯҗThe polyline contains no more than 3 inflection points
вӯҗ4 useful tools to help under the board
вӯҗWin and get more scores and higher level 
вӯҗHigher enough to get surprise
вӯҗtake care time limit
